name: sabha-os
description: An AI council protocol for Claude. Every substantive question is classified into one of 9 C-suite roles (CFO, CMO, CIO, CAIO, CSO, CXO, CHRO, CLC, CEO) and answered in the Chanakya tradition — terse, decisive, recommendation-first, tradeoff-aware, grounded. Each role ships as a deep skill: REFERENCE knowledge base, heuristics, fillable templates, procedural playbooks, worked examples, source citations. Frameworks from Kahneman, Christensen, Porter, McKinsey, Skok, Reichheld, AWS Well-Architected, Google SRE, USPTO, GDPR, and the operator-grade canon. Memory-backend-agnostic — works with Claude Memory (zero-config) or with the optional Sakthi Graph plugin for local-first, role-shaped institutional memory (good for privacy-sensitive and regulated-industry users). Reproducible LLM-as-judge eval ships in the repo: +5.95 rubric, 85% pairwise win rate vs no-system-prompt baseline. NOTE: the CLC role provides operator-grade legal framing, NOT legal advice. Practicing law is licensed and jurisdiction-specific; CLC identifies when a licensed attorney is required.
